title: ononis viscosa subsp. brachycarpa
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. brachycarpa, also known as sticky ononis or sticky jointed clover, is a subspecies of the Ononis viscosa plant, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting kidney function, among others. Ononis viscosa subsp. brachycarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
